description: Style NoteWith bold prints on this classic jersey, adidas brings in sport style with a bang this spring. A sharp add to an off-duty wardrobe, balance it with tailored shorts or fitted denim trousers. An effortless way to infuse a sport-inspired lifestyle into your everyday wear, this one is worth the buy, especially because it's from our favourite sportswear brand Adidas!Product DetailsBlue and black crew neck jersey, sleeveless, Adidas patented stripes along either side, graphic print, mesh inner lining for increased absorptionMaterial and Care100% polyesterGentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeDo not iron on print or decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18'') is wearing a size M
